data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a 'Minimum bid' but did not provide any concrete evidence that this requirement is covered. While the linked use case mentions a minimum bid of $500, there are no API reads or persisted state checks provided to confirm that this requirement is actively enforced in the system. Therefore, the evidence indicates a gap in the requirement's coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming the enforcement of the minimum bid requirement.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
